---
title: "reference_semiring_conv"
generated: true
description: "Pure-JAX reference for [`semiring_conv`](../nitrix-semiring-conv/semiring_conv.qmd)."
---

[вЂ№ back to `nitrix.semiring.conv`](../nitrix-semiring-conv.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:reference_semiring_conv -->
```python
reference_semiring_conv(x: Num[Array, '... *spatial c_in'], k: Num[Array, '*kspatial c_in c_out'], *, semiring: Semiring[Any], stride: Union[int, Sequence[int]] = 1, padding: Union[str, Sequence[tuple[int, int]]] = 'SAME', dilation: Union[int, Sequence[int]] = 1, backend: Backend = 'jax') -> Num[Array, '... *spatial_out c_out']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:reference_semiring_conv -->
Pure-JAX reference for [`semiring_conv`](../nitrix-semiring-conv/semiring_conv.qmd).

Performs NaN-safe patch extraction (padding with the algebra's
identity and gathering via `jnp.take`) and then applies
[`semiring_matmul`](../nitrix-semiring.qmd) over the reshaped patches
for the per-output-position reduction.  See the module docstring
for the full forward strategy.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:reference_semiring_conv -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `x` | `Num` | `...` Г— `*spatial` Г— `c_in` | вЂ” | Input array in channel-last layout: arbitrary leading batch dimensions, followed by the spatial dimensions and a trailing input-channel axis `c_in`. |
| `k` | `Num` | `*kspatial` Г— `c_in` Г— `c_out` | вЂ” | Convolution kernel: the spatial extents `*kspatial`, then the input-channel axis `c_in` (which must match `x`) and the output-channel axis `c_out`. The number of spatial dimensions is inferred as `k.ndim - 2`. |
| `semiring` | `Semiring[Any]` | вЂ” | вЂ” | Algebra whose `binary_op` combines the receptive field with the kernel and whose `monoid` reduces the products; its `identity` is used as the padding value. |
| `stride` | `Union[int, Sequence[int]]` | вЂ” | `1` | Per-spatial-dim window stride, either a single `int` applied to every dimension or one value per dimension. Default `1`. |
| `padding` | `Union[str, Sequence[tuple[int, int]]]` | вЂ” | `'SAME'` | `'SAME'`, `'VALID'`, or an explicit per-spatial-dim sequence of `(lo, hi)` pairs. Default `'SAME'`. |
| `dilation` | `Union[int, Sequence[int]]` | вЂ” | `1` | Per-spatial-dim kernel dilation, either a single `int` or one value per dimension. Default `1`. |
| `backend` | `Backend` | вЂ” | `'jax'` | Execution engine forwarded to the inner [`semiring_matmul`](../nitrix-semiring.qmd). Default `'jax'`. |

**Returns** `Num` вЂ” shape `...` Г— `*spatial_out` Г— `c_out`. Convolved output in channel-last layout: the original leading batch dimensions, the strided/padded output spatial extents `*spatial_out`, and the output-channel axis `c_out`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:reference_semiring_conv -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `c_in` | *(undocumented вЂ” add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `*kspatial` | a variadic group of axes (`kspatial`) |
| `c_out` | *(undocumented вЂ” add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `*spatial_out` | a variadic group of axes (`spatial_out`) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
